description: Fit the RNA velocity model and build the cell-cell transition graph. For mode=dynamical, scv.tl.recover_dynamics runs first to estimate full splicing kinetics; then scv.tl.velocity(mode) and scv.tl.velocity_graph. Writes a velocity-annotated .h5ad.
rules: read-only input — writes a new velocity.h5ad under record_store
input must be moments-ready (run the preprocess perk first)
mode=dynamical runs recover_dynamics first (slow; ~10-30 min for 10K cells) and adds fit_* gene parameters
supported modes: stochastic, deterministic, dynamical, steady_state
usage: Set INPUT (preprocessed .h5ad). Optional: MODE (default dynamical), N_JOBS (default 4). Output: velocity.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scvelo installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder velocity.h5ad and still passes. latent_time downstream needs MODE=dynamical.
